user_query: I'm planning a surprise birthday party for my best friend who loves gaming. Can you recommend some popular games currently on special discount offers using the SteamGames Special offers API? Also, fetch the details of a random Counter-Strike skin from the 'Knife' class using the cs-skin API.

TaskList.description: Fetch the current special discount offers on popular games from the Steam Games API.
Fetch the details of a random Counter-Strike skin from the 'Knife' class using the cs-skin API.
